title: rachicallis rupestris
intro: Rachicallis rupestris is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae, commonly known as the "rock melastome" or "mamey de monte." This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues such as fever, digestive problems, and respiratory infections. The health benefits of Rachicallis rupestris include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and promote wound healing. Rachicallis rupestris is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be used to make herbal teas, tinctures, and ointments for topical application.
